programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Humans, Monkeys and Rats, Oh Thai!
programme.desc: A workaholic mom and a loner are challenged to survive three weeks in Thailand. Competing with monkeys and rats for food, it's a daily struggle not only to survive, but to understand each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Deserted and Dehydrated
programme.desc: A hunter from Louisiana meets a surfer girl on a deserted island of the Philippines. With very little water to tap into, dehydration soon sets in and the duo spends most of their time securing a water source.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Swamp Survival
programme.desc: An Army mom and a Marine are shipped out to the swamps of the Florida Everglades where they will put their military survival training to the test, facing alligators, venomous water moccasins and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Beating Heart 'Bama
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed 'King of the forest' and an endurance athlete take on the Alabama backwoods. They secure shelter and fire, but once hunger kicks in it pushes one of them to do something we've never seen before.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Madness in Madagascar
programme.desc: Two survivalists journey to the most hostile environment on the planet to take on the Amazon without modern conveniences or clothing. They attempt to survive while battling piranhas, jaguars, and mosquitoes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Savannah Slam
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Sick as a Skunk
programme.desc: After a typhoon scatters debris through a Philippine forest, a stay-at-home mom and stubborn trucker try to survive there. Combating sickness and no food, they come together and ward off hunger by eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Cuddle Clash
programme.desc: An ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling in the Panamanian jungle. When the challenge overwhelms one of them, the other must forage, trap and even kill to keep a glimmer of hope alive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Mismatch in the Mountains
programme.desc: An Army vet and a newly married man grapple with gender norms in the mountains of Croatia. Hunger and frigid temperatures force this unlikely pair to bond together, but a storm threatens to rip them apart.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Flood and Fauna
programme.desc: A surfer and an Ex-Military take on the Texas countryside, surrounded by Armadillo, big horn sheep and vicious wild boar. As they battle starvation and face a potentially fatal flood, their skills will be tested.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: The Haunting
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie continue the hardest challenge of their lives in the haunted swamps of Louisiana. They must endure constant threats from predators, while desperately trying to secure food to keep them going.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dangerous Delicacies: Swamp Redemption
programme.desc: Jeremy, a former Naked and Afraid survivalist, returns for his chance at redemption in the haunted swamps of Louisiana and is joined by Michelle, an Air Force veteran. Trouble hits the partnership early on.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: d+ Sneak Peek: Ticked Off
programme.desc: Naked survivalists are challenged to survive in harsh and dangerous environments.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters retrace the investigations of Nazi relic hunters who searched for the Holy Grail and other lost Templar relics. Their expedition reveals just how close the Nazis came to uncovering ground-breaking Templar secrets.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Controlled Fire, Car Chase
programme.desc: A fire explodes and disaster comes from a police chase.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: The Fishing Machine
programme.desc: YouTube star Richard Gene the Fishing Machine joins Jimmy for bass fishing.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Salmon on Restigouche River
programme.desc: We're chasing Atlantic Salmon on Canada's Restigouche River.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Porsche Collision, Refinery Explosion
programme.desc: Two Porches collide at triple digit speeds; a massive explosion sets off a shockwave; a torrent of water explodes through a storm wall.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Post-Storm Fortune
programme.desc: Smiling Bob's Fish Dip and Tonio's Seafood Shack and Tiki Bar are visited.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Josh Holubz
programme.desc: An Army veterans shares how he left his newborn daughter and was severely wounded by a machine gun in Iraq.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Fort Myers, Florida - After Hours Snapper
programme.desc: George fishes for snapper around a wreck off Fort Myers.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Everglades City Snook
programme.desc: Rick's son Collin joins him for snook fishing in 'The Gateway to the Ten Thousand Islands.'

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: You've Got Another Sting Coming
programme.desc: On a sun-scorched Brazilian island, aggressive anaconda and deadly stingray torment survivalists Whitney and Nathan, pushing both of them to their breaking point. Working together, they use their hunting and fishing skills to try and make it 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Twinning
programme.desc: In an unprecedented Naked and Afraid challenge, identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, are dropped in the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Category Five Survival
programme.desc: A category five hurricane blasts through the camp of Amal, an Iraqi war refugee now living in Iowa and her partner, Duke. In addition to the hurricane, the pair also endures venomous spiders, insects, and nocturnal predators in the swamps of Florida.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped on a deserted Fijian island. They must battle the elements, as well as each other’s annoyances, as they try to survive 21 days together. With blistering heat, minimal water and scarce food, this will be no honeymoon.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A biology student and an expert survival instructor team up on the swampy shore of Croatia. A strong partnership is forged through braving the elements and facing their demons, but takes a turn for the worst with a freak accident.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Frozen and Afraid
programme.desc: Dropped onto a frozen Alaskan glacier, all-star survivalists Laura Zerra and Steven Hall scramble to stave off frostbite and hypothermia. Later, 7,000 miles south, two new survivalists take on a sun-scorched Brazil island, with anaconda and stingray.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Don't Sweat It!
programme.desc: Audrey pops the painful bumps that cover her body so she can feel relief. Felicia has a peculiar looking dark growth on her forehead. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that on any given day she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Cindy's Story
programme.desc: Cindy is resistant to change and has spent years creating a world that makes her feel safe. When her friend notices Cindy's health declining rapidly due to her size, she pushes Cindy to move to Houston and see Dr. Now. But Cindy isn't so easily persuaded.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla's Story
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Milla is bedridden and dependent on her husband and five kids. Terrified that each day will be her last, they still can't resist her unending requests for junk food.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Cindy's Story
programme.desc: Cindy is resistant to change and has spent years creating a world that makes her feel safe. When her friend notices Cindy's health declining rapidly due to her size, she pushes Cindy to move to Houston and see Dr. Now. But Cindy isn't so easily persuaded.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Supersized: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla's Story
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Milla is bedridden and dependent on her husband and five kids. Terrified that each day will be her last, they still can't resist her unending requests for junk food.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Oh My God! Welcome to My Home!
programme.desc: Randy officially kicks off his 'SAY YES AMERICA' tour. When he shows up at unsuspecting Katie's front door she gets the shock of her life. Bride Dana wants to flash her tats on the wedding day but her conservative entourage won't go down without a fight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: America Coming Together
programme.desc: After putting on the wedding of a lifetime, Randy and Hayley sit down at Kleinfeld to reminisce on some of the fun, emotional moments of the season including some never before seen footage.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage
programme.desc: Sometimes, a bride's entourage is bossy instead of helpful. Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ball gown. Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest
programme.desc: Broadway star Sutton Foster hunts for a dress to top all the other dresses she's worn. Wedding dress model Lauren fears she has worn too many gowns to find one that feels special. Hope is renewing her vows and this time she wants to wear her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!
programme.desc: It's shopping chaos at Kleinfeld's blow-out sale! Danielle and Kathryn want the same gown- but there's only one and Jessica is in search of one very specific dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Quest for Perfection
programme.desc: Actress Laurel is on tour with the musical 'Wicked,' and she wants a dress that doesn't resemble her stage costumes. Picky bride Kea has already tried on more than 100 dresses! Mackenzie worries her beach dress will be too short to cover her bare feet.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side
programme.desc: Miss USA Erin Brady is ready to find her dream dress, but she must also please her mother-in-law.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dueling Visions
programme.desc: Kristin is torn between looking sexy or traditional. Alexa also wants a dress with sex appeal, but she needs to please her conservative dad. Diana can't decide between a flowy or structured gown.

programme.title: Unexpected: Kids Having Kids
programme.desc: A pregnant Jenna wants a car for her birthday. Myrka's mom kicked her out for getting pregnant. Soon-to-be-grandma Jessica tries to salvage the relationship between teens Reanna and Taron. Tyra leaves Alex and Layla behind at home as she heads to college.

programme.title: Unexpected: Worst. Birthday. EVER.
programme.desc: Jenna only wanted one thing for her birthday: a car. Away at college, Tyra receives devastating news. Taron and Reanna accuse each other of cheating weeks before she is due. Myrka and Ethan get an ultrasound, but no one gets to know the baby's gender yet.

programme.title: Unexpected: Invitation to the Gender Reveal
programme.desc: Jessica worries Reanna may be going into early labor. Tyra is furious that Julie's internet boyfriend has moved in. Myrka invites her mom to her gender reveal party. Jenna refuses to move her pet rabbit's cage to make room for a new crib.

programme.title: Unexpected: Catching Up With Hailey 1
programme.desc: Tiarra hears the Matthew drama when she gets together with Hailey. Taron threatens to take Reanna to court to see his baby. Myrka and Ethan prepare for an extravagant gender reveal party. Jenna's dad refuses to let her mom be a part of the baby shower.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen manage to land internships with Google after their careers are destroyed by the digital world. Once inside, they face full on competitions, battling the world's top tech-savvy geniuses in an attempt to reinvent themselves and their careers.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Old School
programme.desc: Three men, yearning for the wild and crazy days of adolescence, make the house that one of them just moved into the stomping grounds for their newly formed fraternity. Along with several misfit college students, the trio try to outwit the vindictive dean.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Huebel
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo are joined by actor Rob Huebel while they check out some 'minor injuries', hang up on some 'inconsiderate cell phone people', and find out why some folks have been ‘banned from the stadium'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXXV

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Iliza Shlesinger

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Eric Andre
programme.desc: Insane comedian Eric Andre joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to check out some aggressive 'Mandozers,' show off some 'Public Meat' and play a fun new game called 'Pick a Person.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some 'white whines,' attend an 'animals anonymous' meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country 'slamburbia.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Duval
programme.desc: Comedian Lil Duval stops by the studio; Rob warns of the dangers of evil tires and how having a Florida vibe isn't always a good thing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Hampton Yount

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from 'space invaders,' nap hard after a 'slumber punch' and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on 'too much nip.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Gary Owen
programme.desc: Gary Owen joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to try out some SACKUPUNCTURE, watch couples get lost in a LOVE BUBBLE, and experience redheads reaching their boiling point in GINGER SNAPS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo fear the stairs in 'evil escies', get in the mood with 'liquor up for love', and make a stylish exit in 'windows are for winners'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub

programme.desc: The co-founder and CEO of Twin Peaks goes undercover in his popular sports bar and grill chain that features provocatively dressed waitresses. While there, he enlists the help of former alum Coby Brooks, who goes undercover as an inappropriate customer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss: EmpireCLS
programme.desc: David Seelinger, chairman and CEO of EmpireCLS Worldwide Chauffeured Services, goes undercover to see if his company is running smoothly.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me

programme.title: Danger Force: Test Friends
programme.desc: Without them knowing, Captain Man puts Danger Force through a series of tests to see if he can trust them. But when the tests get out of hand, the tables turn on who can be trusted.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Carbon Dating and a Stuffed Raccoon
programme.desc: Sheldon gets into trouble with fellow child genius Paige at the science museum while George, Sr. is forced to play therapist to Paige's bickering parents.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An 8-Bit Princess and a Flat Tire Genius
programme.desc: A video game takes over Sheldon and Meemaw’s life. Also, George Sr. is jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel at the auto shop.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Award
programme.desc: Joey is happy to be nominated for a 'Soapie,' the third most prestigious daytime TV award.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: The arrival of Ross and Monica's cousin causes serious distractions for all the men.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel wonders if she should confront her sorority sister about a drunken college kiss.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Vows
programme.desc: With only four weeks left before the wedding, Chandler is still struggling with his vows.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project, and Thanksgiving dinner turns into a family fight when George Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Stunted Childhood and a Can of Fancy Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a kid. Also, Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis’ relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf
programme.desc: Sheldon experiments on Missy, and Georgie joins Mary’s bible study to spend more time with his crush, Veronica.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor
programme.desc: When Sheldon has to spend a few days in the hospital, he turns into the world’s worst patient. Also, Missy gets a taste of what life would be like without her twin.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: David, Goliath and a Yoo-Hoo From the Back
programme.desc: Sheldon uses his new friendship with the school bully to boss Georgie around. Also, Missy steals Meemaw’s makeup for picture day.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Math Emergency and Perky Palms
programme.desc: Sheldon and Dr. Sturgis have their first fight when Dr. Sturgis marks a question wrong on Sheldon’s test. Also, Mary takes over for Pastor Jeff while he's out sick.

programme.title: Mom: Diabetic Lesbians and a Blushing Bride
programme.desc: When Marjorie announces she's getting married, Christy and Bonnie are determined to make it the perfect day.

programme.title: Mom: Sticky Hands and a Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Christy, Jill and Wendy find themselves in a sticky situation when they agree to help Bonnie smuggle an illegal substance across the Canadian border.

programme.title: Mom: Death, Death, Death and a Bucket of Chicken
programme.desc: Christy tries to be supportive when a health scare throws Bonnie into a tailspin.

programme.title: Mom: Nazi Zombies and a Two-Hundred Pound Baby
programme.desc: Bonnie tries to get Christy to admit she still has feelings for her ex-husband, Baxter.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Promo
programme.desc: The Tanner family is chosen to appear in a local promotion for Danny's TV station.

programme.title: Full House: Sisterly Love
programme.desc: D.J. is angry when Stephanie gets the part in a commercial that D.J. really had wanted.

programme.title: Full House: Half a Love Story
programme.desc: Jesse uses the baby to get a date with one of Danny's workers but the date is postponed.

programme.title: Full House: A Pox in Our House
programme.desc: Danny has trouble finding a sitter for Michelle who has chickenpox so he can play ball.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: As Seen On Burrito
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: The Substitute: Zedd
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Steel learns the concept of discipline and takes it too far, putting one of the Rangers in real danger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: Movie: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee that just graduated from college is disillusioned at his only career choice: making honey. While on a special trip outside the hive, a florist saves his life, and he discovers that humans actually eat honey.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind uses three orphans in his grand scheme to pull off the biggest heist in the world, but their love profoundly changes him for the better.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cuddle E. Hugs/ Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him. Patrick wants to be a horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: My Leg!/ Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way no matter what. Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.desc: As deadly wildfires ravage southern California, the LA Fire Department battle to rescue residents trapped by the flames.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Adventures Gone Wrong

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Trapped By Tornadoes

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Frostbite and Bears
programme.desc: Looking at how to survive pursuit by a wild bear and being trapped in a sinking car. Real-life footage tests your instincts against wildfires, frostbite, extreme fog and treacherous underwater currents.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: What would you do if a wall of ice threatened to crush your home? Could you cope being trapped in an elevator? Incredible video pits you against deadly black ice, intense sandstorms, and hungry alligators!

programme.title: Could you Survive? With Creek Stewart: Alaskan Nightmare

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Jailhouse Wreck

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Death Traps: Quicksand, Whirlpools and Riptides
programme.desc: The interaction that land and water has to the Earth not only nurtures life but can also cause strange death traps. Quicksand, whirlpools and rip currents are death traps, ready to take away the unwary.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Animal Invaders

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Ice Tsunami

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Red Rain

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Killer Sea Foam
programme.desc: Killer sea foam, a lake that disappears and reappears, air filled with diamond dust and a snowfall in a Middle Eastern desert are all explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Sand Tsunami
programme.desc: Witness haboobs, hoodoos, ice chimneys and a lake with leopard spots.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house. He fabricated a story about his mother beating him as a means of getting CPS involved. If she doesn't progress, she could lose her son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dorothy and David and Doris
programme.desc: Dorothy and David fell in love with each other over their mutual love of hoarding. Their home is so packed now it has become physically unsafe for Dorothy, and doctors have said one more fall in the hoard could paralyze her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Judy
programme.desc: Judy's life is a dangerous one of severe contradictions. She is an extreme germaphobe who spends her entire day engaged in sanitization rituals, yet she lives in a severe and extremely filthy hoard overridden with mice that she considers her friends.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sybil and Ron
programme.desc: Sybil's hoard is so intense that mice have started to live in her tub and her refrigerator. Ron has hoarded out his camera shop to the point where he has lost many of his customers.

programme.title: Movie: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A singer-turned-actress falls in love with her bodyguard while being stalked by a fan.

programme.title: Movie: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A doctor who was wrongly convicted of murdering his wife escapes and goes in search of the real killer to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Breakfast Foods Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys for another fun glimpse at their lives direct from their home. The fans decide what's on tonight's menu.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: A Glittery Shoe
programme.desc: Sean Patton, Casey James Salengo, and Mehran Khaghani perform.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer gets crazy eyes, Noah Gardenswartz knows what not to say during brain surgery, and Clayton English is convinced that a major pop star is watching him.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes
programme.desc: In this special episode, Michael gives a fresh look to your favourite tricks with never-before-seen footage. From the arcade to the science lab, Michael revisits classic moments with footage from the cutting room floor.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Two
programme.desc: In this special, a trip down memory lane turns trippy when Michael revisits classic bits, including the hallucinogenic frog and the glue-sniffing mishap, to unlock never-before-seen reactions to your favorite jaw-dropping tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Three
programme.desc: In this special, Michael revisits some of the spookiest bits of Carbonaro past to reveal fresh frights with never-before-seen reactions to tricks, including the alien abduction, musical ghosts and mad science experiments gone wrong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes Four
programme.desc: Michael takes viewers behind the scenes and shows them never seen tricks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Ridiculous Antics
programme.desc: TruTV’s Top Funniest splits your sides with the most hilarious videos from across the globe. Watch as a baby elephant gets frisky with the visitors at the zoo, and see what happens when a dad decides to jump into a frozen pool.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Blunders
programme.desc: Watch as DIYers deliver laughs in this collection of home improvement show bloopers. Plus, an amateur stuntman jumps from a moving car but misses his landing. Then, a prankster scares folks with a terrifying spider surprise.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Surprise Laughs
programme.desc: The most hilarious blunders, jokes, pranks, and fails. See what happens when a show-off tries to slide down the railing of an escalator. Then, check out the beachgoer who taunts Mother Nature and incurs the wrath of the sea.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Moments of Regret
programme.desc: Watch celebrity look-a-likes run amok on an unsuspecting public. Plus, a painful tribute to those moments that may you say 'ow!'

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent
programme.desc: The NSA Interns uncover insane videos, including a man who tests homemade chloroform on himself and a massive wedding fail. Plus, the interns investigate a rogue agent's social media.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Film Fail
programme.desc: Learn why the Joker film in the produce section of grocery stores, what the guys tease Murr about and why the audio team had issues recording in a medical office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Trouble Shoot
programme.desc: Find out why Murr is particular about the way labels face in grocery stores, how Sal always gets Joe to break character and who works out with a personal trainer.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ghost Town

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Movie: The Holiday
programme.desc: Two women with romance issues swap homes and fall for men in their new neighbourhoods.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart becomes 'the face of the FBI' when her popularity botches a mission. When her friend, Miss USA, is kidnapped, Gracie decides to defy her superiors' orders and investigates the case on her own.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Titanic Treats
programme.desc: From monster sushi rolls and a five-layer pizza cake to Texas-sized cinnamon rolls and a towering pancake sundae, these dining hot spots are bursting at the seams with titanic treats.

programme.title: Food Paradise: At the Drive-In
programme.desc: From crispy, juicy fried chicken and hearty chili cheese fries to zesty taco burgers and deep-fried hot dogs, diners are pulling up for a taste of Americana.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Day Dining
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy gets a taste of every meal. In Long Beach, California, he's served some delicious short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin' In Beantown
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is in Beantown for an all-Boston smorgasbord. Just outside the city in Allston, two restaurants share an open kitchen but have completely different menus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing sandwiches, spice and everything nice, starting with lights-out lamb in Fargo, ND. A funky spot in Sioux Falls, SD, is loading up hand-held flavor bombs, and, in Fairbanks, AK, a wild pizza place is making spicy, sweet pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Finger Lickin' Chicken
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is chickening out across the country, from a sandwich shop outside Boston to a Filipino favourite in Los Angeles. Plus, a joint in Cleveland brings Guy's catchphrase to life with the Winner Winner Chicken Dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Standards to Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all kinds of joints, from classic Italian to Modern Americana. In Jackson, a California chef is bringing his brand of Mexican to the mountains.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: California Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is on the west coast for a taste of California. In Culver City, Gene Simmons makes a surprise appearance to the neighborhood hangout serving up Hawaiian dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pork, Pasta and Barbecue
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checking out some tried and true local faves. In Kansas City, Mo., the neighbourhood favourite killin' it with their scratch-made standouts like pork hash with black beans.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cannoli, Fritters and Wings
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's rolling out for a festival of flavours. In Portland, Ore., the Guamanian food truck is serving up righteous shrimp fritters and a unique spin on chicken salad.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kings and Queens Of 'Cue
programme.desc: Guy's got the line on some killer barbecue. In Compton, Calif., the backyard joint cuttin' up ribs and real deal collard greens.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Football, Friends and Comfort Food
programme.desc: Trisha has her girlfriends over for their Sunday tradition of football, food, and friends. The menu includes sausage hors d'oeuvres, cheese dip with corn chips, chilli with sour cream corn bread and green punch.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Feeding The Home Team
programme.desc: Trisha presents recipes that are perfect for a large gathering.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: 4th Down and Yum
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli hosts a football-themed party with former NFL pro and Food Network Star, Eddie Jackson. The touchdown-worthy menu includes slow cooker sloppy Joe sliders, homemade potato chips topped with chicken salt, and roasted carrot hummus.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Valerie kicks off football season with white chicken chili and toppings bar, a football cheese ball with herbed crackers, green salad with champagne vinaigrette, toffee buckeyes and a bloody bull cocktail with a spicy pickled okra and green bean garnish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Skillet Stories
programme.desc: The sky's the skillet as Ree Drummond opens up her book of skillet stories, cooking up new dishes in trusty pans while her kids join her to film. Her menu includes a strawberry almond pan cake, breakfast totchos and tortellini puttanesca.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tuesday Night Lights
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a family dinner with her son Todd's favorite foods to celebrate his football team taking on their rivals. She prepares cheesesteak paninis and homemade cheese sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: College Rivals
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares awesome football food inspired by her college rival daughters.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Fondue Party
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's sister is visiting, so Molly's taking her snowshoeing- with treats, of course! They snack on pistachio white chocolates and beef and rutabaga hand pies with jalapeno ketchup.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Open House Tailgate
programme.desc: Trisha prepares some tasty treats including a giant hoagie, sweet tots, loaded pizza dip and dessert nachos for a tailgate at her house. Plus, pro football player DeMarco Murray swings by!

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Ladies Who Lunch
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes a fancy light lunch for her friend Nancy Fuller. The menu includes an assortment of southern tea sandwiches, a lowcountry charcuterie board featuring buffalo blue pimiento cheese and key lime pie tartlets.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Southern Table
programme.desc: Kardea Brown is cooking up the perfect Lowcountry meal for her new Southern table: fried chicken with hot honey sauce, hoppin' John and sautéed green beans with garlic and pepper.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Try Something New
programme.desc: Everyone's trying something new in the kitchen, starting with Jeff Mauro's flavourful hot cheese crunchy mac and cheese. The hosts share new tricks, including Katie Lee's easy two-ingredient cupcake. Then, Geoffrey experiments with Wok Egg Foo Young.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Parking Lot Party
programme.desc: Four feisty chefs rustle up ingredients from supermarket shoppers to create perfect party snacks. Then, there's nothing better for the after party than a hearty breakfast, and it's a mad dash to the finish as the chefs prepare dueling decadent desserts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Winner Winter Games
programme.desc: It's cold outside, but the competition is heating up in Flavortown Market as Guy Fieri welcomes back three previous GGG winners to compete in his winter-themed games.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Viewers Decide
programme.desc: Its Titans West vs Titans East as the two teams compete for who gets Bumblebee.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Great Disaster
programme.desc: Robin gets amnesia and starts thinking that Hawkman is his mother.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Girls Night In
programme.desc: The Girls Night Out team decides to stay in and have a sleepover party, but Blackfire's threats descend on the city and the girls must put aside their fun to stop her.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mothers/ The Password
programme.desc: On Mother's Day, the kids put the mothers through a series of trials to find out who the best mother is. When the kids find out Anais is Richard's favourite child, Gumball and Darwin try to take the title.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Procrastinators/ The Shell
programme.desc: Gumball inadvertently cracks open Penny's shell and discovers who she really is inside. While performing a school play, Gumball is so nervous about kissing Penny that he accidentally headbutts her and cracks open her shell.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mirror/ The Burden
programme.desc: When Gumball refuses to forward a scare email, the curse becomes all too real; Gumball and Darwin are put in charge of their school's ancient hamster.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Bros/ The Man
programme.desc: Granny Jojo brings a boyfriend to her birthday meal; The Wattersons and Larry both have a terrible day.

programme.title: Final Space: Arachnitects
programme.desc: When Mooncake is mysteriously taken from the Crimson Light, the crew must find him in the nether reaches of space. Meanwhile, Tribore rebuilds the resistance.

programme.title: American Dad!: License to Till
programme.desc: When Steve has trouble crossing over into the 'cool kids' social circle, Klaus and Roger place their bets to see how quickly Roger can make him cool. Everything they try backfires until Steve becomes the in-crowd's designated driver.

programme.title: American Dad!: Jenny Fromdabloc
programme.desc: After Snot professes his love for Hayley and gets shot down, Steve and Roger devise a plan to cheer him up. Roger dresses up as Steve's cousin from New Jersey, Jenny Fromdabloc, and Snot falls hard for her.

programme.title: American Dad!: Home Wrecker
programme.desc: Stan and Francine fight over how to redecorate the house. The argument goes so far, that they split the house down the middle and try to live without each other.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: The Rickshank Redemption
programme.desc: The family deals with stuff in this one broh. What's Rick gonna do? This is a real episode right here broh.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Rickmancing the Stone

programme.title: Family Guy: Brian Goes Back to College
programme.desc: After writing a story for a local magazine, Brian lands a job with the New Yorker. However, his college dropout status haunts him so he decides to go back to university to get his degree.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Courtship of Stewie's Father
programme.desc: When Stewie intensifies his efforts to kill Lois, she thinks he is acting out and orders Peter to spend more time with him. They begin to do some bonding until a theme park outing ends disastrously.

programme.title: Assassination Classroom: Pandemonium Time
programme.desc: The E Class tackles an intimidating hotel filled with baddies.

programme.title: SSSS.GRIDMAN: Defeat

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: Four Tails, the King of Sage Monkeys
programme.desc: Kakashi and Guy back up Naruto and Killer B, and the fight intensifies even further.

programme.desc: Tanjiro's world keeps spinning as Kyogai's tsuzumi commands gravity itself with every beat, driving Tanjiro up the wall.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Self-Indulgent 200th Episode Spectacular
programme.desc: When their world starts disappearing, the Titans must confront their creators; the Titans discover how hard cartoons are to produce when they make one about Michael and Aaron.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Bakugan Uproar/ The Fusion Bakugan Sabrus
programme.desc: Dan Kouzu and his friends bond with strange aliens known as Bakugan.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star
programme.desc: A comedic look at the superheroes’ lives. Viewers will finally get the opportunity to watch what life is like for the super teens when their capes are left at home.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League’s Next Top Talent Idol Star: Second Greatest Team Edition
programme.desc: The Justice League holds another talent competition to find the second-best superhero team in the world. The competition heats up and the Titans must find a way to beat the Hive Five.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League's Next Top Idol Star: Justice League Edition
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League’s Next Top Talent Idol Star Dance Edition
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Waffles
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy show their love of waffles by making it the only word they say, much to the annoyance of the other Titans. Maybe Brother Blood can make them stop, with the help of his new henchman, Pain Bot.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Burger vs. Burrito
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Pie Bros.
programme.desc: Cyborg's birthday is coming up, so Beast Boy takes a job at their favorite pie shop so he can buy a birthday gift.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Baby Hands
programme.desc: Brother Blood shocks Cyborg, Raven, Starfire and Beast Boy with a huge laser gun that erases their memories of being a Teen Titan, giving Robin his big opportunity: he can now shape them into the respectable, hard-working team he always dreamed of.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Booty Scooty
programme.desc: The Titans are reckless with their money and health, much to the detriment of their future selves.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Curse of the Booty Scooty
programme.desc: The Titans go on a mission to retrieve Robin's booty after he 'Booty Scooty's' it off.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Titans Go Casual
programme.desc: When the Superhero Board of Authority institutes a dress code, the Titans introduce a Casual Tuesday to their schedule.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: 40%, 40%, 20%
programme.desc: Cyborg's real strength comes not from his robot parts, but from his favorite song.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Refund
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin unsuccessfully attempt to get a refund for their computer game.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Goons
programme.desc: Gumball sets out to win his Dad back by winning a blindfolded 'dumb' race.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sock
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are taught confusing lessons about honesty by the school councillor.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Genius
programme.desc: Darwin is sent away to a government institute for geniuses.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Bumpkin
programme.desc: Envious of his rustic lifestyle, Gumball invites Idaho over to teach the Wattersons how to live like a potato.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pony
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin race home to spend quality time with Anais, but every likely obstacle gets in way, along some unlikely ones too!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Hero
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are determined to prove to their dad that he is their hero, at any cost.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Tag
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin get caught in the middle of Dad and Mr Robinson’s trash-can feud.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Lie
programme.desc: Gumball and Anais create a new holiday to cheer people up during January.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Butterfly
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin release a butterfly that just emerged from its chrysalis, and it wreaks havoc all over town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Question
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Saint
programme.desc: Gumball doesn’t believe that anyone could really be as nice as Alan and sets out to find his breaking point. Alan is so good-natured that Gumball feels compelled to make him lose his temper.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Downer
programme.desc: Gumball is in a funk that is proving hard to shake. Gumball refuses to get out of bed because he is in a lousy mood. When his family try to cheer him up Gumball wishes they’d all just disappear.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Crew
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin attempt to join the baddest crew in town.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signature
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dad tries to stop Granny Jojo getting married.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin do everything they can to stop Mr. Robinson selling his house.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Parking
programme.desc: It takes the Wattersons a little longer than they thought it would to find the perfect parking space at the mall.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Uploads
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin try to tear themselves away from the internet, but end up falling down the Elmore Stream-hole.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Singing
programme.desc: Mr Small feels that he hasn’t inspired the children of Elmore Junior High, so Gumball and Darwin try to lift his spirits.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal
programme.desc: Richard decides that his work around the house is underappreciated by Nicole and goes on strike to prove it.

programme.title: Roseanne: Mall Story
programme.desc: The Conner family spends the day together at the mall. Unfortunately, family time turns into a disaster when Roseanne and Becky disagree over a party dress, Darlene goes on a junk food binge, and Dan gets in a tight squeeze.

programme.title: Roseanne: Becky's Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne invites Chip and his parents over for a dinner party on the same night Becky has plans with her secret other boyfriend. Chip's family and the Conners come to blows in a battle of the classes.

programme.title: Roseanne: Slice of Life
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan fear the worst when Darlene is rushed to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Workin' Overtime
programme.desc: Roseanne's balancing act of motherhood and heavy overtime at work reaches a boiling point. Having been pushed to the edge, Roseanne runs away to a diner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sisters in Rescue
programme.desc: When a 3-legged dog has trouble finding a forever home, Amanda Giese from Panda Paws Rescue comes to New Orleans to help. Parolee Troy shares some life changing news with Tia and the VRC crew. And, Villalobos helps an employee's dad find a new companion.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free
programme.desc: Tania struggles to rescue a puppy that is hiding underneath a shed. A potential adopter comes to Villalobos hoping to find a companion for her dog, and she's only interested in seeing hounds. A beloved employee learns that he's finally off parole.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saved from the Fight
programme.desc: Tia is called in to help rescue five injured dogs from a dog fighting situation. Parolee Spencer gets out of jail and returns to Villalobos. Tia asks Spencer to help out with an adoption to keep him on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Pupularity Playoffs: Week 4
Pit Bulls & Parolees: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: In the midst of the global pandemic, Tia and Mariah must shut down their beloved restaurant and boutique, but look to a new beginning. Meanwhile, a Villalobos senior canine veteran finally finds a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Match Made Perfect
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a stray dog on the train tracks near the Villalobos warehouse. Mariah enlists help to get to the bottom of her dog Tater's nagging pain. A senior dog with a long medical history finally has her shot at a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: In the midst of the global pandemic, Tia and Mariah must shut down their beloved restaurant and boutique, but look to a new beginning. Meanwhile, a Villalobos senior canine veteran finally finds a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tia goes on a dangerous midnight rescue that leads her to chasing down a dog's mysterious origins. A cat threatens the chances of a Villalobos veteran finding a forever home. Finally, a Parolee puts his neck out to help a friend get a job.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Risky Business
programme.desc: A former volunteer return in hopes of adopting a dog she fell in love with but her boxer threatens her chances. A parolee risks his freedom when he goes down the wrong path after being released from prison.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Good Gone Bad
programme.desc: Tia sends Mariah to California to rescue a former member of the VRC family. A puppy's behaviour puts her chances at a forever home at risk. After receiving a call about a pit bull, Tia jumps into action.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Broken Home
programme.desc: Tia and Matt are heartbroken when they are called to pick up some dogs whose owner has recently passed away. Then, a potential adopter is looking for a dog that will thrive in a B&B.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Believers: Hell's Honky-Tonk
programme.desc: A bar owner resorts to an exorcism after his pregnant wife is attacked by an angry entity, a family seeks help after their dog is literally scared to death and a young boy is haunted by a ghost with evil intentions.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Stairway to Hell

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Fear Factory

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Evil in the Attic

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: You Dim Sum, You Lose Some

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Kary'd Away

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Dallas: Whine Connoisseurs

programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: 40 Years of Winter
programme.desc: After Christmas shopping, 18-year-old Linda Velzy vanishes into upstate New York's frozen landscape. The primary suspect refuses to talk to detectives, so Linda's father hatches a desperate plan. But temperatures are dropping and time is running out.

programme.title: Third Time's a Crime
programme.desc: In 1984, Glenna Kaye Catlin passes away after a month of intensive medical care. The cause of her fatal illness eludes California's finest doctors, but one woman is determined to prove that Glenna was murdered by a sinister killer who has gone undetected.

programme.title: Jeffrey Dahmer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Driven To Murder
programme.desc: After locals smell what can only be the scent of charred meat, police find burned remains in an abandoned mining pit in the small town of Hibbing, Minnesota. Before they can investigate who committed the crime, first they must identity the body.

programme.desc: In 1984, Glenna Kaye Catlin passes away after a month of intensive medical care. The cause of her fatal illness eludes California's finest doctors, but one woman is determined to prove that Glenna was murdered by a sinister killer who has gone undetected.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Love and Obsession
programme.desc: A New York socialite is terrorized by a sadistic stalker who threatens to kidnap her daughter.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Monster
programme.desc: A look at the life of Aileen Wuornos, America's first female serial killer and the woman Hollywood dubbed 'Monster.' In a never before seen interview, Aileen reveals intimate details of the love affair that led her to killer seven men.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will. Another man is visiting his girlfriend at work on Valentine's Day when a robber leaps onto the counter. Both men take heroic action, ensuring no harm is done.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Trial by Violence
programme.desc: A father lunges at a serial killer; a defendant attempts to stab an attorney; an Alaskan wildlife enthusiast is tased; a daughter yells at her father's killer; a man threatens a female judge; a defendant walks out of his trial; a man lights up in court.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Clues Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother of three is gunned down in a church basement where she's set to teach a fitness class. Police find surveillance video showing a figure in full police body armor stalking the floor in the lead-up to the slaughter.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: A loving mother is shot three times at a gas station in Memphis, Tennessee. As police search for clues, a mysterious letter threatens to complicate the already-tense relationship between local law enforcement and the community they've sworn to protect.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: The Silver Man
programme.desc: The Atlanta Homicide team is called to a crime scene when a body wrapped head to toe in silver tape is discovered at a church playground in an upscale Atlanta neighborhood. Once the victim's identity is unveiled, a twisted love triangle is revealed.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Stuck in a Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt for a pyromaniac with a fiery temper and a callous disregard for human life.

programme.title: Web of Lies: D is for Deadly
programme.desc: Dallas teen track star Shania Gray is left traumatized after being raped while babysitting. When a new Facebook friend offers support, she opens up to him.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain

programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
