programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Getaway/ Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. When Mr. Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost and found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Main Drain/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in and becomes Squidward’s best friend.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: Squidward's arch nemesis, Squilliam, returns to harass Squidward on his failed life. SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: How To Use A Frozen Krabby Patty
programme.desc: The Frozen Krabby Patty is now for more than eating!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Krabby Patty Song
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sings a song about a frozen Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Have You Seen This Snail?
programme.desc: SpongeBob's pet snail Gary runs away after SpongeBob forgets to feed him.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Whittle Me This/ Mayor May Not
programme.desc: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy. Timmy wishes dad was mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Wish/ Go Young, West Man
programme.desc: Adam West never had a 'normal' childhood; Timmy loans his godparents to Tootie.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Sheep Dog/ Mom's Away
programme.desc: Dudley goes undercover as a lady sheep to catch the Chameleon who's been 'fleecing' sheep out of their money. TUFF gets intel that Snaptrap has taken all the moms. Dudley must rescue them before they're shipped away.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard: Adventures in Snotty Sitting
programme.desc: Otis breaks the farmer's video game system, so the animals make money to replace it.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: My Big Fat Spy Wedding
programme.desc: Baker sends Jimmy on a special mission to track the activities of Beautiful Gorgeous.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Evil Beneath/ Carl Wheezer Boy Genius
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Bahama Quadrangle to disprove the myth of the disappearances associated with the mysterious site; Carl's pen pal, Elke Elkberg from Sweden is coming to Retroville to meet him, and Carl is in a panic.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Beasts Unleashed
programme.desc: Scientists tap into the Morphin Grid, but an evil virus corrupts the technology and a new team of Power Rangers is formed to defend the Grid from evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Evox's Revenge
programme.desc: When Grid Battleforce's Commander needs to select a leader for the team, the Power Rangers are at odds over who should get the job.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles discover for the first time that they’re not the weirdest things in New York.

programme.title: It's Pony: Annieversary/ Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Annie wonders why Pony is celebrating. And, Pony gets to go to school after being named class pet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous! Part II: The St. Canardian Guardian!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Every Frog Has His Day
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Lost Commanders
programme.desc: Ahsoka sends the Rebel crew to find and recruit a war hero to their cause, but when they discover it is Captain Rex, trust issues put the mission at risk.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Relics of the Old Republic
programme.desc: Ezra and the crew begin to develop friendships with Captain Rex and his colleagues, prompting them to work together against an attack by Agent Kallus.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Always Two There Are
programme.desc: Ezra, Sabine, Zeb and Chopper are interrupted by Inquisitors while salvaging medical supplies at an abandoned medical station.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Stealth Strike
programme.desc: A new Imperial ship captures Ezra, Commander Sato, and his crew, forcing Kanan and the clone to go undercover as stormtroopers to free the rebels.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: The Future of the Force
programme.desc: The rebels learn that the Inquisitors are seeking out Force-sensitive children, and they work together to protect the young ones from the Inquisitors' pursuit.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Shroud of Darkness
programme.desc: Kanan, Ezra and Ahsoka return to the Jedi Temple on Lothal, seeking answers from Yoda about the Inquisitors' ability to continually track the rebels.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Hiro gets set up with 14-year-old Megan, leading him to wonder if he's missing out on a normal life. The team must deal with an upgraded High Voltage.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight

programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.desc: Derek learns more about Mark and Addison's relationship while Bailey treats a mother battling breast cancer. The interns spend their time defending a resident's competence as Meredith and Addison examine a couple in a rather awkward position.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let the Angels Commit
programme.desc: Much to the envy of her fellow doctors, Cristina scrubs in on the rare 'humpty dumpty' procedure before Alex questions his future medical specialty. Derek gets a surprise while George and Addison work with a pregnant woman with an unusual dilemma.

programme.desc: Brenda finds herself transporting a robbery suspect in a recreational vehicle driven by her parents.

programme.title: The Closer: Controlled Burn
programme.desc: A massive fire breaks out in Griffith Park and an unidentified woman's body is found in the centre of the scene. Meanwhile, Brenda and Fritz are living in a small apartment and getting on each other's nerves.

programme.title: Major Crimes: #FindKaylaWeber
programme.desc: A professional baseball pitcher's daughter goes missing, and the Major Crimes team's investigation leads them to the very limits of the justice system. Rusty is put in an extremely awkward position as Slider approaches the last phase of his trial.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Penalty Phase
programme.desc: Sharon and the team track an unhinged killer making his own film with his victims as the stars as a new romance takes wing.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: A young woman and her three-year-old son are shot to death while driving through gang territory in the wrong colored car, and the gun used in the murder is quickly connected to the most troubling series of unsolved homicides in LAPD history.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: A killer is using online ads to find the perfect candidate for murder: men no one will notice are missing. Meanwhile, Jane discovers that keeping her pregnancy quiet will be a tough assignment.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: Gods, Guns and Government (Part 1)
programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)
programme.desc: The siege at Waco ended in a fiery battle that killed David Koresh, his followers, and his multiple wives and children. TV news crews and demonstrators watched in horror as the ranch went up in flames.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Love, Sex and Greed

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 2/ 1917 REO
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken. Richard's luck turns when the 1967 Porsche 911S he buys turns out to be something better. Tom better get crankin' on a 1917 REO or he'll be fired.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mega Cash Days: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Bracket two race kicks off with sixteen new drivers, including No Prep King Champ Ryan Martin and Memphis leader JJ The Boss. A fresh section of road challenges every driver to put down his fast pass.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Turn It Up
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: A horrifying crash makes one racer fear his racing days are over and Chief and Shawn learn what it takes to win without the other's help for the first time.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boosted to the Max
programme.desc: A familiar face returns to the 405's list, bringing with him a new car with scary potential. Working on his own, Shawn tries to prove to his son he has what it takes to climb the ranks.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Jumping the Shark-Pool
programme.desc: Chief introduces an idea to make the list even faster: The Shark Pool. Now, a hungry group of street racers will be showing up every week to take on #10. Doc and Monza battle. Farmtruck schools a shark pool racer regarding an old debt.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Boosted to the Max

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Embrace the Suck
programme.desc: Terry, our Green Beret, is ambushed on vacation and tossed out of an airplane into the middle of the ocean in the Gulf of Mexico. Facing the threat of dehydration and freezing conditions, will Terry's training help him survive the challenge and find land?

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Volcano Nightmare
programme.desc: Jake, our former Navy SEAL, is ambushed and dumped atop a volcano in Iceland. Facing deadly avalanche fields, boiling mud pits and sulphuric geysers, Jake could lose more than the game when he makes a near-fatal error in the land of fire and ice.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: Army Veteran Tom is captured, hooded, handcuffed and dropped on a volcano in the wilderness of Chile. He'll need all his bushcraft skills to scale glaciers, conquer an impenetrable jungle and brave the desolation as he races to find civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Arctic Disaster
programme.desc: Primitive skills expert and endurance athlete Matt is captured and dropped into chest-deep snow in the Arctic Circle. Wearing nothing but his buckskin shorts and sandals, he has to fight through a frozen swamp of snow to find his way back to civilization.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Extreme Survival Instructor John is gassed by the guys at his dentist appointment, extracted to the Canyon lands of Utah and dropped into a 200 ft. crevasse. Forced to confront a devilish maze of claustrophobic dead end passages, can he make it out?

programme.title: Moonshiners: First Run
programme.desc: Tickle bootlegs at night, while Wayne comes up with an ingenious drop-off plan for his own bootleggers. Equipment failure threatens the production of Tim Smith's legal moonshine, and Josh and Bill finally begin their first run of strawberry brandy.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Blue Moonshine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill are forced back to their day jobs after their shine runs blue. Chico, under financial stress, makes a hard decision that could risk it all. Tickle struggles to keep Tim's old territory supplied. Mark and Jeff move their liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rival Shiners
programme.desc: Tim reaches a milestone with his first bottled batch of shine. Jeff and Mark suspect a rival in their territory. Chico takes a risk that could cost him everything. Josh and Bill's only hope at financing their shine operation is to consider bootlegging.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Bootlegging Blowups
programme.desc: Tim enlists Tickle's help to investigate his new still hand, Chico. Josh and Bill take on new risks as they try to stay alive in the moonshine game as bootleggers. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine War
programme.desc: Tickle goes undercover in Kentucky to find out what Chico has been up to. Josh and Bill hit the open road to bootleg shine at a music festival, but they soon hit a violent roadblock. Jeff, Mark and Lance look to take out the competition with one shot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Firewater
programme.desc: Josh and Bill suffer the consequences of bootlegging. Darlene goes against her best instinct and lights up her still indoors. Jeff, Mark and Lance find their competition is still out there. Tim takes final measures to protect his legal shine business.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark look to cash in on one final run of the season. Tickle and Chico's still site is compromised. Mike is desperate to complete his New Orleans order and turns to Darlene. Josh and Bill might get to sell some of their own liquor after all.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Drinks Nail Polish/ Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Ventriloquist/ Cat Lady
programme.desc: April's addiction to her puppets has gotten so strong she can't go anywhere without them, practicing up to 12 hours a day. Meanwhile, Debbie is severely allergic to cats, but has over twenty of them, leaving her in isolation from the outside world.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Wears Diapers/ Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She chooses to live as an adult baby to escape the stress of the real world. And Charmissa stuffs her bra with the dryer sheets she chews on for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Inflatables/ Butt Injection Addict
programme.desc: Mark has been addicted to his 15 inflatable pool toys, eating, sleeping, and bathing with them. Meanwhile, Karmello has been getting black market butt injections for the last three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Pony Play/ Addicted to Drinking Paint
programme.desc: A single mother of two has been addicted to drinking paint for nearly three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/ Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her 10-pound locks. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road

programme.desc: It's the 4th of July 2004 and on a ranch near Roswell, New Mexico, tragedy strikes. A family is found murdered, but when the 14-year-old killer is brought to justice, he finds surprising support from his community.

programme.title: Killer Cases: The Doctor is Dead
programme.desc: Dr. Teresa Sievers, a rising social media star, was found bludgeoned to death in her kitchen. Detectives began to focus on her husband Mark, who had taken out a large life insurance policy on his wife.

programme.title: Killer Cases: Murder Under a Blue Moon
programme.desc: After Richard Smith failed to show up for work, police discovered his dead body alongside those of his mother and brother in their home. Deputies told the media they were investigating possible links to the Wiccan religion.

programme.title: Killer Cases: Murder at the Mall
programme.desc: 39 years after the murder of Michelle Martinko, detective work and modern investigative techniques led to an arrest and first-degree murder charges.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Movie: Ride Along

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Fit For The Fastlane
programme.desc: Terry prepares to announce at a NASCAR race, which will be his first public appearance since the pandemic started. Wanting to look his best, he tries getting back into shape while trying to convince Rachel to sing at the speedway.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Oui Oui Terr-y
programme.desc: Tammy grows suspicious of Terry’s romantic anniversary surprise trip to Paris. Meanwhile, Zurie joins in on the Bradshaw family tradition and finds her passion for showing horses.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Top Chef
programme.desc: Terry and Tammy attempt one last time to try and convince Lacey and Noah to move to Texas by offering to buy them a restaurant. Meanwhile, Rachel introduces her new guy to the family by pulling a major prank on Terry.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Decisions, Decisions
programme.desc: Rob struggles to find a way to be civil with Chyna, Khloe puts Kourtney through a series of tests to cure her indecisiveness, and Kim jets to New York with Kylie for Kanye's highly-anticipated Yeezy fashion show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Royalties and Loyalties
programme.desc: Kim is torn over maintaining a relationship with Cait and decides to first confirm that her mom's reason for cutting ties is valid. Kendall introduces her sisters to the first openly gay royal whose life story hits close to home with the family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister Surrogacy
programme.desc: Khloé explores the possibility of becoming Kim's surrogate, but receives some shocking news about her own fertility in the process. Meanwhile, the sisters pressure Kourtney to step her flirting game up, and Rob threatens to bail on his 30th birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: MILFs Gone Wild
programme.desc: Scott isn't happy when Kourtney goes on a girls' trip to Mexico to celebrate her birthday. Kim isn't impressed when some less than flattering photos of her time in Mexico find their way onto the web.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!
programme.desc: Kim's confidence is still shaken up from the Mexico trip. Khloe wants mother-daughter bonding time and isn't impressed when Kris has no time for it. Kourtney is keeping her dating life on the down low.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Clothes Quarters
programme.desc: Kourtney plans a fun sister getaway to bond with Kendall, but is distracted by news of Scott's destructive behavior at home. Later, Kim stages an unwelcome intervention on Khloé's wardrobe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Catch Me If You Cannes
programme.desc: Scott threatens to ruin Kourtney's trip to Cannes. Kim struggles to set clear boundaries with her assistant and the girls get educated about Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fan Friction
programme.desc: Khloe fears that Cleveland fans may turn on her family. Kim gets fed up with her lack of willpower and makes a drastic lifestyle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Close to Home
programme.desc: Kim is shocked to learn about the rising rate of homelessness in LA and sets out to bring awareness to the growing crisis. Meanwhile Kris hires a scribe to document her every word.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Dog Tired
programme.desc: Khloé and Kendall consider getting guns for protection, Kris imposes strict guidelines for her mom to follow in her new condo, and later Kim can't handle her new rambunctious puppy.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Baby One More Time
programme.desc: Kim gets some big news about the future of her family. Later, Kim and Khloe compete to win the affection from Kris.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Edge
programme.desc: The race begins to secure food and shelter before the snow flies. Heimo's family hunts for caribou, but a bear could stop them in their tracks. Tyler and Ashley work to pull in a winter's supply of salmon. Bob and Nancy face a hard truth about his future.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: The Seldens embark on a four-day trapping loop that could lead them through dangerous conditions. Heimo must compete with a pack of wolves to secure a moose for winter. The Lewis cabin is rehabbed, but the girls still have a lot to learn.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Dark Winter
programme.desc: It's the dead of winter and the Last Alaskans move through the icy Arctic. Heimo still needs a moose, while the Seldens embark on the next part of their trapline journey. One of the last of the Last Alaskans, 19-year-old Charlie Jagow, is introduced.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The sun returns, signalling late winter in ANWR. An unwelcome intruder threatens Tyler and Ashley's success. Heimo and Edna say a final goodbye to their oldest cabin, while Charlie meticulously builds his very first and reflects on his future in the bush.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Inside the Bowl: PBXII Star's Double TD
Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: When Darkness Doesn't Fall
programme.desc: An Alaskan summer proves to be beneficial as the family uses the extra daylight to forge ahead. Atz Lee uses a helicopter to haul in vital equipment, Jane and Charlotte wrangle an angry nest of wasps, while Eivin makes way for an upgraded chicken coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Call of the Coyote
programme.desc: When rampaging moose threaten a family's source of food, the Raneys spring into action to secure their homestead. Then, the Raneys race to rescue an Arizona family stalked by ravenous coyotes and cattle.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: When Darkness Doesn't Fall
programme.desc: An Alaskan summer proves to be beneficial as the family uses the extra daylight to forge ahead. Atz Lee uses a helicopter to haul in vital equipment, Jane and Charlotte wrangle an angry nest of wasps, while Eivin makes way for an upgraded chicken coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Call of the Coyote
programme.desc: When rampaging moose threaten a family's source of food, the Raneys spring into action to secure their homestead. Then, the Raneys race to rescue an Arizona family stalked by ravenous coyotes and cattle.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Vows of the Frontier
programme.desc: When you're living in the last frontier, an Alaskan vow renewal ceremony would not be complete without a runaway tractor, a nasty infestation, and a frustrating fishing trip.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: A Frontier Feast
programme.desc: While foraging and hunting are never easy, they can result in a sweet reward when everything comes together. The Kilchers make a true Alaskan feast from the stockpiles they've worked so hard to amass.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Jungle Kitties and Baby Skunks
programme.desc: Oreo, a tiny tuxedo kitten meets a similarly attired companion: Nellie the Skunk.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Crazy Cat Opens Doors
programme.desc: The episode features the story of a violent cat, Sebastian, whose guardians have a newborn in jeopardy, a divorced man whose wild cat, Zeus, is threatening to leave him, and a 'my cat from heaven' story about a life-saving cat from Ohio.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Wild Butterfly Escape
programme.desc: A family in Independence, OH who run a hope center want to build a therapeutic space in the trees. Believing in the healing power of trees and treehouses, Pete builds a butterfly-themed treehouse in a cluster of 6 trees featuring a climbing net and loft.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brace Yourself for Employee of the Month
programme.desc: The ATM crew builds a realistic reef in a luxury condo complex. Then, the guys build a tank in the shape of a cooling knee brace.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Standing Strong
programme.desc: Tia and Louise go on a frantic search for a loose pit bull in the neighbourhood surrounding Villalobos. A new parolee assists in his first adoption and Tania receives devastating news about her pit bull, Bluie.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Risky Business
programme.desc: A former volunteer return in hopes of adopting a dog she fell in love with but her boxer threatens her chances. A parolee risks his freedom when he goes down the wrong path after being released from prison.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Order on the Border
programme.desc: Wardens check hunting camps at the height of deer season. On the Rio Grande River, they stop a Mexican fisherman from poaching in U.S. waters. A Game Warden near Austin must rescue a trapped deer and get it to a rehabber.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Boy
programme.desc: After living too long at home with his mother, an unemployed young black man finally accepts his responsibilities as a man and a father when he is faced with adversity.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Martin: Credit Card Blues
programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.desc: Martin is chosen to produce a charity show, but lets the power go to his head.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Lost Tribes and Levitating Humans
programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team investigate the mythical Orang Pendek as well as levitation and a possible developed-immunity to electrocution.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Weeping Mary and the Montana Alien
programme.desc: Tom Harris's team investigates videos of a strange figure caught on a security camera and a statue that appears to be crying real tears.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Orbs and Lightning Balls

programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team examine evidence surrounding mysterious objects spotted over Miami and strange remains that could be from an escaped mutant monkey.

programme.desc: The team investigates a recent video of a large, hairy creature, a man who dodged rush hour traffic and a woman's strange escape from her sinking vehicle.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: In 1969, Hollywood was at the centre of a brutal and sadistic killing spree. Charles Manson and his cult of followers killed more than half a dozen innocent people, two of which are believed to haunt a house on Cielo Drive.

programme.title: Haunted History: Lost Souls of Pennhurst
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, Pennhurst Asylum became overcrowded, which resulted in an overwhelmed staff and rampant abuse. It was finally shut down, but it is said the ghosts of patients and employees still roam the halls today.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Torso Murders
programme.desc: The Great Depression of the 1930s saw many of the poor move into shantytowns. One such shanty was terrorized by The Mad Butcher of Kingsbury Run, who was never identified or apprehended.

programme.title: Haunted History: Salem Witch Trials
programme.desc: In 1692, 19 innocent people were hanged and one was pressed to death for the practice of witchcraft. Today, Salem, Massachusetts is a town renowned for its numerous accounts of paranormal activity.

programme.title: NCIS: React
programme.desc: When Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter learns that her daughter has been kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring her home. Also, McGee's childhood friend is in town to assist the team with training.

programme.title: NCIS: Day in Court
programme.desc: In order to clear his name, a petty officer volunteers to be court martialed if NCIS agrees to conduct its own investigation after his murder case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant. Also, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: In the hopes of sparing a family further tragedy, the Secretary of the Navy calls on NCIS to help a sailor battling leukemia locate a bone marrow transplant. Also, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel
programme.desc: After Ducky is attacked by a man claiming to have information about his half-brother who died decades ago, the team searches for the perpetrator. Also, with the holidays approaching, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Sister City
programme.desc: After a private jet's passengers and crew travelling from New Orleans to Washington, D.C., are lethally poisoned, all evidence points to the missing chef, Abby's brother, Luca. Gibbs and the team work in conjunction with Pride and the New Orleans team.

programme.title: NCIS: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury, the NCIS team uncovers the resurgence of an international human trafficking ring. Also, McGee hopes to spend the night at a colleague's home after a power outage.

programme.title: NCIS: Decompressed
programme.desc: When a deep sea diver is murdered on the job, his body and suspected coworkers must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days, leaving the team to complete an unorthodox investigation from outside the tank.

programme.title: NCIS: React
programme.desc: When Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter learns that her daughter has been kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring her home. Also, McGee's childhood friend is in town to assist the team with training.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Merry Evasion
programme.desc: The team searches for a motive when a senator's daughter is attacked. Meanwhile, Deeks and Nell partner up to help Sam and Callen bring the daughter to safety and Kensi receives the perfect holiday gift from one of her co-workers.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Allegiance
programme.desc: While in Afghanistan, Kensi and Granger join the team on a joint case when a federal agent in Los Angeles tied to Hawala, an ancient system of money transfer, is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: War Cries
programme.desc: When two private military contractors are murdered, the teams' investigation leads to a suspect who puts one of their own in serious danger. Meanwhile, Sam sets up Callen on a blind date.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Legacy
programme.desc: A student's death at an elite private school leads Goren and Eames to investigate a world where grades mean everything, kids live their lives online, and everyone has something to hide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: When the decapitated, stabbed, and mutilated body of Kyle Jones is found in Maspeth Creek, the entire community is suspected when it becomes clear that he was not welcome in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Last Rites
programme.desc: Logan's faith in the system is put to the test when a priest asks him to reinvestigate a 16-year-old triple homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Allegiance
programme.desc: Halstead and Atwater go undercover to prevent military-grade weapons from hitting the street. Voight calls in a favor as a last-ditch effort to clear Olinsky's name for Bingham's murder.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Homecoming
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Intelligence seeks justice for Olinsky after he's stabbed in prison. Antonio's loyalty is tested when Woods looks to take down Voight once and for all.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: New Normal
programme.desc: Bad heroin is causing overdoses in Chicago, and Intelligence is a man down after Voight is suspended. Antonio takes charge but Ruzek undermines his authority.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Endings
programme.desc: In the concluding third part of a three-show crossover event, Intelligence races to find the man responsible for the high-rise fire. And for Halstead, the case is personal.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Politics get in the way as the team tries to rescue a teenage girl kidnapped by a robbery crew. Voight and Platt try to exonerate Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ride Along
programme.desc: A ride along goes awry, and Burgess must decide whether to follow Voight's advice or that of a new ally.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: While undercover, Ruzek discovers his father is working for a suspected drug dealer and is forced to ask whether his dad is involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale
programme.desc: The Simpsons decide to embrace a cheaper, alternate source of energy by erecting a wind turbine in their backyard. When Homer realizes that some of the power is being directed to the local electric company, he decides to remove his home from the grid.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender
programme.desc: When Moe discovers a hidden talent for judging contests, he is approached by a television agent to join the 'American Idol' judges' panel. Moe flies to Los Angeles where he tours the Fox lot and receives some sage career advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa

programme.title: The Simpsons: MoneyBart

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Simpson, This Isn't Your Life
programme.desc: When the Simpsons visit Marge's childhood home and discover a box of her old belongings, Lisa is surprised to learn that Marge was once a stellar A+ student. Meanwhile, Bart puts Nelson and his bullying ways in place and claims the title of School Bully.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Makes Paddy’s Great Again
programme.desc: Meet Cindy, the new, ethnically diverse female member of the gang who can successfully pull off scams. Everything is working until Mac introduces a new member: a life-like sex doll that looks exactly like Dennis.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Escapes

programme.desc: To one-up the guys, Dee has organized an 'all-female reboot' of the Wade Boggs challenge on a first-of-its-kind, all-female flight headed to L.A. for the women’s march.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Kelly and Hyrum Lai always knew their picture-perfect life together would include a dog, but early on their Lab puppy Holly began displaying disturbing behaviour.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Dane at a Time
