programme.desc: Dr. Pol stays busy helping a feisty cow with a stinky foot problem, a down-cow taking a treatment that could kill it and Buddy, the Shih Tzu with a bulging eye who's seen better days.

programme.title: Battle for the Pride
programme.desc: Follow a pride of lions in Botswana to discover the brutal realities of family life in the wild.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Amazon Dungeon
programme.desc: An infamous prison in the Amazon and a deserted military facility in the remote English countryside contain a haunting and deadly past; experts investigate the secrets of these remarkable places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of The Pyramids
programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders of Rome
programme.desc: Cutting-edge archaeological methods help experts unearth the dark secrets hidden at seven wonders of ancient Rome. What they find challenges everything we know about this once-mighty empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Modern Wonders of America
programme.desc: The seven engineering marvels that are regarded as the modern wonders of America set the benchmark for structural innovation, and now investigators use hidden records to decode and reveal the mysteries behind these historic American icons.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Murder by Numbers: Friend of the Devil
programme.desc: Within a month, four men in Orange County are brutally stabbed by a mysterious man. No one makes a connection to a gruesome double murder of a mother and son two months earlier, except the man sitting in prison for killing his own family.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: The Perfect Suspect: Every Step You Take
programme.desc: Shortly after 30-year old Katrina Smith vanishes, investigators discover her abandoned car, as well as security footage of a mysterious stranger walking alone the night she went missing. Soon, secret lives will be unlocked and suspects will emerge.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Closer Than You Think
programme.desc: Candiace Person is murdered in her home, and Atlanta Homicide detectives uncover evidence that her killer meticulously stalked her prior to her death. Now, detectives have to turn the tables and stalk this dangerous killer on the loose.

programme.title: Time Is Running Out
programme.desc: A series of terrifying 911 calls from a young mother in grave danger send police into a tailspin as they try to find and save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Closer Than You Think
programme.desc: Candiace Person is murdered in her home, and Atlanta Homicide detectives uncover evidence that her killer meticulously stalked her prior to her death. Now, detectives have to turn the tables and stalk this dangerous killer on the loose.

programme.title: Time Is Running Out
programme.desc: A series of terrifying 911 calls from a young mother in grave danger send police into a tailspin as they try to find and save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Blinded From the Truth
programme.desc: All Debra Hartmann desired was a life of luxury. She seemed to have it all: fur coats, fancy car, and a boyfriend. There is only one thing getting in her way of the perfect life: her husband.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: The Price of Greed
programme.desc: Betty Lou Lazarra's stunning looks have always taken her far in life. But when this single mom meets wealthy businessman, Al Haber, she won't rest on her appearance alone.Betty Lou's stepkids discover the hard way just how determined and evil she can be.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Torched Heart
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 saying an intruder just entered her home and shot her husband. When the victim, a local fire chief, dies from his injuries, the first responder community works tirelessly to find out who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: As beautiful young women continue to disappear out of their Kansas City area apartments, police piece together evidence that the terrifying crimes are all connected.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Burning Season
programme.desc: Decorated Detective Debbie Harris is put to the ultimate test when she's called in to investigate a six-alarm fire with all of the the case evidence up in flames.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: The Perfect Family
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania family was brutally murdered in their home, which shocked their community for years to come.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blood Red Sun
programme.desc: The most violent night in the history of Anchorage, Alaska leaves seven dead - including four teens. And, the small police department is virtually overwhelmed by the string of shootings until clues lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Preserving a Passion That's 'In-Tents'
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger
programme.desc: In Orwigsburg, Pennsylvania, the Barnwood Builders save one of the biggest barns they have ever seen. This dangerous demolition demands the best of everyone.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work to salvage a cabin that saved their business. It takes a variety of repairs to bring it back to life, but once it's up, Katherine has the best surprise of all. Later, Mark's pal Eddie makes a lamp out of reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Alton Crown Affair
programme.desc: Alton Brown proves that crown roast of lamb can be a dish to shock and awe.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Wing and I
programme.desc: Prepare America's most ubiquitous of bar foods, Buffalo chicken wings.

programme.title: Good Eats: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Alton breaks out the cast iron and uses his hearth and grill to whip up good eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cincinnati
programme.desc: Andrew celebrates the can't-miss local favorites of Cincinnati, including pork schnitzel, goetta and Cincinnati chili.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab. Giant sea whelks terrorize the folks of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Merry Wishmas!
programme.desc: When Timmy doesn't get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Terrible Twosome/ App Trap
programme.desc: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof's terrible twos. Timmy wishes up the world's coolest smartphone. The phone has everything but it soon starts to take over Timmy's life.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy: Close Encounters of the Doomed Kind/ Golden Retriever
programme.desc: Dudley and Keswick manage to make contact with aliens, but then Snaptrap commanders the alien ship to wreak havoc on Petropolis with the high tech weapons.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Return of the Nanobots
programme.desc: Jimmy's attempts to update the Nanobots lead to a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Brobot/ The Big Pinch
programme.desc: Jimmy constructs the perfect little brother; Jimmy brings Thomas Edison to the present.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Albrittina/ Simon for President
programme.desc: When Alvin catches Simon taking a test to discover his soul mate, he decides to do the same and prove just how silly the test really is. Simon and Alvin decide to rebel and launch their own campaigns for class president.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: End of the Road
programme.desc: Zoey tries to convince Coral Harbor to switch from cars to Morph-X bikes, and Blaze executes an evil plan.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Digital Deception
programme.desc: Ravi is shocked by the evil Roxy when she comes to his rescue, leaving him to wonder if there's still some good left in her.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: War and Pizza/ Newsworthy
programme.desc: The Turtles help April throw a not-so-happy birthday party. An anchor man turned mutant-worm used to report the news, now he's making headline.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Hyper-potamus Pizza-Party-torium
programme.desc: Hiro’s faith in his friends starts to fray when they show up late to a mission. Hiro and a short-handed Big Hero 6 must attempt to stop Noodle Burger Boy and his new sisters.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Curse of the Ghost Tree
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Happy Birthday, Isabella!
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: This Just In: Math Tutor
programme.desc: Cassie and Rex try to find a solution to pass the math exam, so Liz suggests they all use a tutor. Meanwhile, tragedy strikes Becca as she discovers she has a pimple.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Who's Afraid of J.C. Small?
programme.desc: Mike and Carl arrest Molly’s literary hero, J.C. Small, for a DUI.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Ryan v. John Baker
programme.desc: Kristin finds herself comparing her boyfriend Ryan, who is on strike from his driving job, to the ambitious John Baker. Meanwhile, Mike and Eve try to catch each other unaware as part of sniper training.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Larabee for School Board
programme.desc: Mike is reluctant to support his neighbour, Carol Larabee, in her bid for the local school board. So when her campaign signs begin to mysteriously disappear, her husband, Chuck, wonders if Mike is behind it. Eve gets mixed messages when she goes to Mandy.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jacked o' Lantern
programme.desc: Ever since he was a kid, Dre has loved Halloween. Now that he lives in one of those 'good candy neighborhoods,' kids come from all over the city to trick-or-treat, including Dre’s own nieces and nephews.

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: After the Gotham City Police Department has been overrun and outgunned by criminal gangs, Kate Kane becomes Gotham's new vigilante.

programme.title: Charmed: Someone's Going to Die
programme.desc: The Destruction of the Sisterhood looms large as the Charmed Ones face down the Faction. Harry and Macy are divided over a potential ally.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Voice
programme.desc: George's employer tries to get rid of him after discovering that he isn't really handicapped. Kramer decides to get an intern to help him out. Jerry breaks up with his girlfriend when she takes offence to one of his voices.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Serenity Now
programme.desc: Frank must say 'serenity now' whenever he feels his blood pressure rise. Kramer installs a screen door outside his apartment. George takes on his rival when his father hires them both to sell computers. Jerry's girlfriend comments on his lack of emotion.

programme.title: Mom: Soup Town and a Little Blonde Mongoose
programme.desc: When Christy gets sick, Bonnie is consumed with an overwhelming urge to mother her.

programme.title: Mom: Lumbar Support and Old Pork
programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam’s bar is doing well. Also, Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Two Openings
programme.desc: As Max and Caroline, now part owners of the diner, put the finishing touches on their converted Dessert Bar, Max deals with the aftermath of her breakup with Randy. Sophie goes into labour just before the Dessert Bar's grand opening.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Two Openings
programme.desc: As Max and Caroline, now part owners of the diner, put the finishing touches on their converted Dessert Bar, Max deals with the aftermath of her breakup with Randy. Sophie goes into labour just before the Dessert Bar's grand opening.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Blackout
programme.desc: Jack Raydor is back again, defending a man who is attempting to withdraw a confession in the murder of his wife. A last-second video purporting to provide the defendant with an alibi alerts the Major Crimes team to the possibility of a conspiracy.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Buys a House
programme.desc: Fed up with a noisy neighbour, Monk decides to move into a new house, where he encounters more than the usual pitfalls of home ownership.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features the cast of ‘Godmothered’, Rachel Brosnahan, Ryan Reynolds, Morena Baccarin, the cast of ‘Safety’, Moses Ingram, Justine Marino, Ronke Adekoluejo, Gillian Flynn, Milla Jovovich and Dua Lipa.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Receipt Not Discreet/ Financing for Dogs
programme.desc: A group of diners is targeted because of their appearance; dispute over payment for puppy.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: You Did Not Watch My Dog/ It's Hard Out Here for a Nanny
programme.desc: Neighbors argue over vet bill; nanny claims she is over-worked and underpaid.

programme.title: Protection Court: Tasmanian Devil/ Climbed on My Car
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Wreck My Bike? Buy My Bike/ Hungry Young Intern Arrested
programme.desc: A dispute over damage to a motorcycle; an overzealous journalist is arrested.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Whalon vs. Leblanc / Leblanc
programme.desc: A Texas woman says she's reached her breaking point and will divorce her husband if the DNA test proves he's fathered yet another child with his outside woman!

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Baylor vs. Earls, Sr
programme.desc: Rumors of cheating caused this Texas man to call off the wedding and he vows to end the relationship if the DNA test reveals he's not the father.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tiffani says that her ex-boyfriend Ronnie owes her $1600 for unpaid car insurance, $85 in EZ pass tolls and $600 in toll tickets that he accumulated while driving the vehicle registered in her name.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A mother is suing her son’s fiancé for rent, an electric bill and emotional distress, but the woman claims she gave her future mother-in-law money towards the bills, but she spent it all on drugs.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Tyrine is suing Arisia for failure to reimburse her on faulty candles that were purchased. Arisia says she doesn't owe Tyrine anything as she made the candles and the customer got what she paid for.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve I Think He Paid to Pass, I Need Your Test
programme.desc: Danielle was just 9 months pregnant with her second child when she believes her fiancé, Ray, cheated on her. Ray has done everything he can to prove that he was faithful, including a lie detector test, but Danielle believes he paid to pass the test.

programme.title: Maury: I Could Tell by the Ultrasound Picture ... That's Not My Baby!
programme.desc: On today’s Maury, Lexis says her husband Pierre has made her life a living hell. On top of his constant accusations of cheating, Pierre also denies being the father to her sons. He says he knew from the ultrasound that another man fathered her children.

programme.desc: Ziggy says that her cousin Asia was flirting and trying to seduce her boyfriend Jesse with her mac and cheese dish.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: Chop Shop
programme.desc: While Bow prepares for the Johnson family's annual Christmas card shoot, Dre takes Junior and Jack to the Barber Shop to get a haircut from his lifelong Barber, T.

programme.title: All American: High Expectations
programme.desc: Spencer confides in Layla when he feels pressure on and off the field. Jordan realizes he needs to step up with Spencer and Billy gone. Olivia tries to avoid the issues of Sumer as Asher keeps bring it up. Coop doesn't think Mo has good intentions.

programme.title: Batwoman: Bat Girl Magic
programme.desc: Ryan deals with the challenge of living a double life. Mary is Team Ryan while Luke still has reservations. Victor Szasz is slashing through the streets and Commander Kane has The Crows trying to stop the fly of Snakebite through Gotham.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Blood
programme.desc: Jerry's parents hire him a personal trainer after noticing his weight gain. Elaine over-compensates when her friend implies that she isn't responsible enough to watch children.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Muffin Tops
programme.desc: Elaine starts a new business selling only muffin tops; George pretends to be a tourist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Goldbergs Never Say Die!

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
